---
title: "Google Analytics"
description: "GA4 measurement plan and SEO readiness notes for Arg Tech automotive sales and portfolio credibility."
---

## Measurement Objectives

| Objective | Example Event | Why It Matters |
|---|---|---|
| Vehicle interest | `vehicle_view` | Shows which inventory or segment attracts attention |
| Marketplace movement | `marketplace_click` | Tracks cross-channel shopper behavior |
| Contact intent | `call_click` or `email_click` | Measures direct lead actions |
| Purchase readiness | `test_drive_request` | Tracks high-intent buyer behavior |
| Portfolio review | `presentation_download` | Signals technical portfolio engagement |

## UTM Naming Standard

Use lowercase, hyphenated values so campaign performance is easy to compare.

| Field | Example |
|---|---|
| Source | `google_ads` |
| Medium | `cpc` |
| Campaign | `suv_inventory_launch` |
| Content | `clean_title_suv` |

Example URL:

```text
https://manton1234.github.io/digital-marketing-portfolio/?utm_source=google_ads&utm_medium=cpc&utm_campaign=suv_inventory_launch&utm_content=clean_title_suv
```

## SEO Readiness

- Each page has a descriptive title and description.
- The site has a clear target audience: professors, hiring managers, clients, and potential automotive business partners.
- Navigation labels match employer expectations.
- Project titles include relevant keywords such as Google Ads, Facebook Marketplace, automotive sales, GA4, dashboard, and analytics.
- The `site-url` field is included so Quarto can generate correct canonical links after deployment.
- `robots.txt` allows search engines to crawl the site.

## Launch QA

- Confirm the deployed GitHub Pages URL loads on desktop and mobile.
- Verify every navigation link works.
- Confirm profile, GitHub, LinkedIn, and contact values are current.
- Check that the dashboard renders and charts are visible.
- Create a real GA4 property after publishing, then run a real-time report test.
